---
title: "Research"
---

Works in Progress:

-   Congressional Oversight Overseas: Information Provision through Diplomacy

-   Messaging at the Water's Edge: Congressional Polarization and U.S.-China Relations

    (with Young Yang)

-   Foreign Lobbying and Legislative Behavior

Data:

-   Roberts, Margaret E., Lei Guang, Young Yang, Harris Doshay, and Rachel Yu (2023). [Congressional Tweets on China Dashboard](https://chinadatalab.ucsd.edu/tweets/).

Relevant Writing:

-   Yang, Young and Rachel Yu (2023) "[Congressional Tweets on China: A Guide to Using the Data Portal](https://chinadatalab.ucsd.edu/viz-blog/congressional-tweets-on-china-portal/)", China Data Lab, 21st Century China Center.
